## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the content marketing engagement between Attention and GrowthX, aligning on strategy, goals, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Attention's key differentiators: AI-powered sales coaching, CRM AutoFill, and upcoming workflow builder functionality](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Content focus: Sales methodologies, AI in sales, and job-to-be-done approach for addressing pain points](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Action plan: GrowthX to deliver calibration articles, followed by 10 pieces of content next week, with ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

## Topics

### Attention's Product Overview

  - [Primary features: Sales coaching with customizable methodologies (e.g., MEDDIC), CRM AutoFill, and follow-up email drafting](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Upcoming feature: Workflow builder for programmatic actions based on call content](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Target market: Companies with 3+ sales reps, ideal customers have 20+ reps](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Pricing: Custom, based on number of sales reps](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Sales cycle: 2-3 weeks average, longer for larger organizations](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

### Content Strategy and Competitors

  - [Previous content efforts: Salary data, Salesforce questions for RevOps persona](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [LinkedIn: Team posts regularly with methodical amplification](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Competitors: Otter (strong in organic), HubSpot, Gong](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Content opportunities: Sales methodologies, best practices, hiring/onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

### Content Approach and Timeline

  - [Week 1-2: Deliver 3 calibration articles, then 10 articles](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Week 3: Begin indexing, suggest ICP filtering tools](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Week 4-5: Refine strategy based on performance, update earlier content](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

### AI and Sales Focus

  - [AI-forward positioning has performed well in ads](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Explore content around AI SDRs and competing with platforms like 11x.ai](https://fathom.video/share/T-uM98j4eUgJvL18kmh_euChizU7gUqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
